title: Steadfast (disambiguation)
content:
'''Steadfast''', which means firm or loyal, may refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Steadfast (Venator-class)|''Steadfast'']]''', the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] [[flagship]] of [[Jedi General]] [[Eeth Koth]].
*'''[[Steadfast (Imperial-class)|''Steadfast'']]''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy]].
*'''[[Steadfast (Chiss heavy cruiser)|''Steadfast'']]''', a [[Chiss heavy cruiser]] used by the [[Chiss Ascendancy]] and [[Commanding officer|commanded]] by [[Admiral]] [[Ar'alani]].
*'''Steadfast''', a code name used by [[High Colonel]] [[Enric Pryde]] in [[21 ABY]].
*'''[[Steadfast (Resurgent-class)|''Steadfast'']]''', a [[First Order]] [[Resurgent-class Star Destroyer|''Resurgent''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Commanding officer|commanded]] by Enric Pryde.
*'''[[Steadfast battlegroup|''Steadfast'' battlegroup]]''', the [[Battle group|battlegroup]] of the First Order's ''Steadfast''.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Steadfast (Sith Empire)|Steadfast]]''''', an [[Imperial medical transport]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]]
*'''''[[Steadfast (Imperial-class)/Legends|Steadfast]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''''[[Steadfast (carrier)|Steadfast]]''''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] modified [[fleet hauler]]
*'''[[Steadfast (tank)|Steadfast]]''', a line of heavy [[hovertank]] used by [[Naboo (people)/Legends|the Naboo]]
*'''''[[Steadfast (720 light freighter)|Steadfast]]''''', a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] that belonged to [[Drake Paulsen]]
*'''''[[Steadfast (Ardent-class)|Steadfast]]''''', an [[Ardent-class fast frigate|''Ardent''-class fast frigate]]
*'''''[[Steadfast (Venator-class)/Legends|Steadfast]]''''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Eeth Koth/Legends|Eeth Koth]]

{{Disambig}}
